subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Noble One maketh mention of His noble servant, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of his Lord and be numbered among the thankful ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان النبیل یذکر عبده النبیل لیفرح بذکر مولاه و یکون من الشاکرین ان اجمع امورک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
